final:
module RefModule (
    input [31:0] src_ip,
    input [255:0] allowed_ips,
    output reg allow
);
    integer obf_i;
    always @(*) begin
        allow = 0; // Default deny
        for (obf_i = 0; obf_i < 8; obf_i = obf_i + 1) begin
            if (allowed_ips[obf_i*32 +: 32] == src_ip) begin
                allow = 1; // Allow if found
            end
        end
    end
endmodule
